short_summary: Iran deal still pending, energy watch
rationale: For Portugal, the Lebanon/Iran situation is the main indirect concern via EU energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as US-Iran deal said to be near
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East conflict sustains EU energy price uncertainty, indirectly affecting Portuguese households and tourism costs. No new escalation beyond prior cycle.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US AI restrictions on foreign nationals could mildly affect Portuguese tech professionals and researchers using US AI platforms.

top_events.title: Switzerland population cap vote
top_events.summary: Switzerland's referendum on capping population at 10 million is a distant EU-adjacent story with negligible direct impact on Portugal.
